cases.title: Inbound web-form lead with mapped region gets auto-assigned
cases.gherkin:
Given a region mapping exists for Country=US, State=California -> Rep_A
When an inbound web-form lead is created with Country=US, State=California
Then the lead Owner is set to Rep_A within 5 seconds
And an audit log row records the inputs and the chosen Owner
And Rep_A receives an in-app notification and an email within 60 seconds

steps.action: Submit web form with country=US, state=California, valid contact details
Wait up to 5s and reload the lead
steps.expected: Owner = Rep_A (the mapped rep for CA)

steps.action: Open audit log filtered by this lead
steps.expected: One row with country=US, state=CA, region=US-West, owner=Rep_A, reason=auto-assigned

steps.action: Check Rep_A's inbox and in-app inbox
steps.expected: Notification email + in-app entry with lead deep link, name, company, phone, source

cases.acceptance: Acceptance criterion A in BRD met.

cases.title: Inbound lead from unmapped country uses ROW round-robin
cases.gherkin:
Given no region mapping exists for Country=Argentina
And the ROW pool contains Rep_X, Rep_Y, Rep_Z (round-robin)
When three inbound leads are created with Country=Argentina in succession
Then the Owners are Rep_X, Rep_Y, Rep_Z respectively
And each assignment is recorded in the audit log with reason=ROW round-robin

steps.action: Create lead #1 with country=Argentina
Create lead #2 with country=Argentina
Create lead #3 with country=Argentina
Open audit log for the three leads
steps.expected: Three rows with region=ROW and reason=ROW round-robin

cases.acceptance: Acceptance criterion B in BRD met.

cases.title: Auto-assignment skips a rep who is on PTO
cases.gherkin:
Given the ROW pool is Rep_X (PTO today), Rep_Y, Rep_Z
When an inbound lead from an unmapped country is created
Then Rep_X is skipped
And the lead Owner is Rep_Y
And the audit log shows skipped=Rep_X with reason=PTO

steps.action: Mark Rep_X as on PTO in the HR system mock
steps.expected: HR integration returns PTO=true for Rep_X

steps.action: Create an inbound lead from an unmapped country
Open audit log for the lead

cases.acceptance: Acceptance criterion D in BRD met.

cases.title: Admin manual reassignment with reason updates audit log
cases.gherkin:
Given a lead is auto-assigned to Rep_A
When a Sales Ops admin reassigns the lead to Rep_B with reason "rep on leave"
Then the lead Owner is Rep_B
And the audit log contains a row with action=manual_reassign, admin=<admin_user_id>, from=Rep_A, to=Rep_B, reason="rep on leave"

steps.action: Open the lead as a Sales Ops admin
Reassign to Rep_B with reason "rep on leave"
Try reassigning without entering a reason
steps.expected: Save is blocked with validation error: reason is required

steps.action: Open audit log
steps.expected: Row with action=manual_reassign, admin id, from/to, reason

cases.acceptance: Acceptance criterion C in BRD met.

cases.title: Standard sales user cannot manually reassign a lead
cases.gherkin:
Given a lead is auto-assigned to Rep_A
And I am signed in as a standard sales user
When I open the lead
Then the reassign action is hidden or disabled
And a direct API call to change Owner returns 403

steps.action: Open the lead as a standard sales user
Call PATCH /crm/v3/Leads/{id} with new Owner via REST API

cases.acceptance: Reassignment is gated to Sales Ops admins only.

cases.title: Region mapping with invalid Assigned_User is rejected at config save
cases.gherkin:
Given I am a Sales Ops admin on the Region Mapping settings page
When I add a row with Country=DE, Region=EMEA, Assigned_User=<deactivated user>
Then Save is blocked with the error "Assigned user must be an active CRM user"

steps.action: Open Region Mapping settings as Sales Ops admin
Add row with deactivated user as Assigned_User and click Save
steps.expected: Validation error displayed; row not saved

cases.acceptance: Mapping config is robust against stale user references.

cases.title: Auto-assignment completes within 5s p95
cases.gherkin:
Given a load harness creates 100 leads in 60 seconds
When measuring the time from lead create to Owner != "Unassigned"
Then the p95 is <= 5 seconds

steps.action: Run the load script to create 100 leads
Compute the p95 of (Owner-set timestamp - Create timestamp) from the audit log

cases.title: Existing duplicate-detection rule still fires on inbound lead
cases.gherkin:
Given a lead with Email=foo@bar.com already exists
When an inbound web-form lead with Email=foo@bar.com is submitted
Then the duplicate-detection rule fires as before
And auto-assignment is not applied to the duplicate (it is merged or flagged per existing policy)

steps.action: Pre-create a lead with Email=foo@bar.com
Submit a second lead with the same email
steps.expected: Duplicate-detection treats it as a duplicate; no new auto-assignment audit row is created

tasks.name: Inbound web-form lead with mapped region gets auto-assigned
tasks.description:
Gherkin:
Given a region mapping exists for Country=US, State=California -> Rep_A
When an inbound web-form lead is created with Country=US, State=California
Then the lead Owner is set to Rep_A within 5 seconds
And an audit log row records the inputs and the chosen Owner
And Rep_A receives an in-app notification and an email within 60 seconds

Steps:
1. Submit web form with country=US, state=California, valid contact details -> Lead is created in CRM
2. Wait up to 5s and reload the lead -> Owner = Rep_A (the mapped rep for CA)
3. Open audit log filtered by this lead -> One row with country=US, state=CA, region=US-West, owner=Rep_A, reason=auto-assigned
4. Check Rep_A's inbox and in-app inbox -> Notification email + in-app entry with lead deep link, name, company, phone, source

Acceptance:
Acceptance criterion A in BRD met.
